items.title: Why Boeing Stock Had Such a Great Day
items.description: Shares of  Boeing  rose Tuesday after the company reported solid monthly deliveries.  Boeing stock added 2.9%, closing at $232.61, while the  and  rose 1.1%.  A strong market can help shares of any company, but Boeing had good news for investors, too.

items.title: Boeing Stock Is Having a Great Day. Here Is Why.
items.description: Shares of  Boeing  rose Tuesday after the company reported solid monthly deliveries.  Boeing stock was up 2.4% at $231.52, while the  and  were up 1%.  A strong market can help shares of any company, but Boeing had good news for investors, too.

items.title: Boeing plane deliveries fell in July
items.description: Boeing delivered 48 airplanes in July, down from 60 in June, which was its best month in a year and a half
